title: Coinbase lets businesses accept USDC payments from AI agents
summary: Coinbase lets businesses accept USDC payments from AI agents
briefing: The exchange also introduced AI trading tools and a developer kit as part of a broader push to build financial infrastructure for autonomous AI agents.

title: Bitcoin slides below $65K as Iran conflict fuels $100 oil and bond-yield surge
summary: Bitcoin slides below $65K as Iran conflict fuels $100 oil and bond-yield surge
briefing: Bitcoin price forecasts diverge as US-Iran war tensions fueled an ongoing oil and bond-market surge, while July Fed rate-hike odds neared 40%.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Crypto industry to contribute $55B to US economy in 2026: NCA study
summary: Crypto industry to contribute $55B to US economy in 2026: NCA study
briefing: The research released by the organization said that crypto companies will directly or indirectly lead to 232,000 jobs across the entire US economy in 2026.

title: As BitMEX exits, analysts warn crypto consolidation is accelerating
summary: As BitMEX exits, analysts warn crypto consolidation is accelerating
briefing: BitMEX’s shutdown marks the end of one of crypto’s earliest derivatives exchanges as analysts point to rising regulatory costs, market concentration and the shift toward licensed trading venues.

title: Robinhood CEO’s X account hacked in apparent memecoin scam
summary: Robinhood CEO’s X account hacked in apparent memecoin scam
briefing: A hacker reportedly took over Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev’s X account to promote a fake “VLAD” memecoin, posting what appeared to be a malicious token contract address.

title: Goldman Sachs CEO backs ‘not perfect’ CLARITY Act as vote expected soon
summary: Goldman Sachs CEO backs ‘not perfect’ CLARITY Act as vote expected soon
briefing: Goldman chief David Solomon will support the crypto market structure bill now in Congress, even as financial companies and banks are hesitant over provisions on stablecoins.

title: Here’s why the CLARITY Act’s ethics deal may be so hard to reach
summary: Here’s why the CLARITY Act’s ethics deal may be so hard to reach
briefing: Both parties say they want US crypto market structure legislation, but a dispute over ethics rules and who enforces them is becoming the bill’s biggest obstacle.

title: Goldman Sachs CEO Breaks With Wall Street to Back Crypto Clarity Act
summary: Goldman Sachs CEO Breaks With Wall Street to Back Crypto Clarity Act
briefing: Solomon's endorsement splits with JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon and banking trade groups, who warn the bill's stablecoin-yield provisions could pull deposits away from traditional lenders.

title: Nasdaq-Listed Zhibao Wants a Bitcoin Treasury, Plans to Sell $220M in Stock for BTC
summary: Nasdaq-Listed Zhibao Wants a Bitcoin Treasury, Plans to Sell $220M in Stock for BTC
briefing: A Shanghai-based insurance-tech company trading below $1 wants to build a bitcoin treasury by taking BTC directly as payment for new shares.

summary: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev's X Account Hacked to Shill Fake 'Vladhood' Token
briefing: The deleted post touted a bogus "Vladhood" token as the mascot of Robinhood Chain—the latest fraud to exploit a network currently dominated by memes.

title: Bitcoin May Have Already Bottomed—If the Fed Helps, Says Grayscale
summary: Bitcoin May Have Already Bottomed—If the Fed Helps, Says Grayscale
briefing: The crypto asset manager thinks the four-year cycle is dead, suggesting Bitcoin's price will follow macro forces and the Fed's next move.

title: Brazilian Farmers Are Tokenizing Cows to Get Farm Loans—And It's Working
summary: Brazilian Farmers Are Tokenizing Cows to Get Farm Loans—And It's Working
briefing: The first tokenized livestock deal on Brazil's stock exchange offers dairy farmers a lifeline as the sector's credit crisis deepens.

title: BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Pledge $15M to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin
summary: BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Pledge $15M to Quantum-Proof Bitcoin
briefing: Nine of the biggest institutional names in Bitcoin formed a consortium to fund the developers working to keep the network secure—including from future quantum computers.

summary: Southeast Asian Scam Networks Cost Victims Up to $114B in a Year: UN
briefing: Once-fragmented syndicates have fused into a single, tech-driven criminal economy that increasingly runs on crypto, the UNODC warns.
